query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get quick-clay polygons filtered by high-risk identifier (to be filled after inspection)

4.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim municipality filtered by kommunenummer

5.description: find parcels that intersect the high-risk quick-clay polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid and count matches
